title: OpenAI's AI spending spree has ballooned to $750B | TechCrunch
summary: Based on documents Georgia Power filed with the PSC, most of the new capacity will come from natural gas. Altogether, the new fossil fuel capacity will more than double Georgia Power’s natural gas fleet .
